Off Calendar Feb-27-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants David A. Sherak And Vogt/Resnick/Sheral, Llp For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Jan-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JEANY A. DUFF of Vogt, Resnick, Sherak, LLP, Tel No. (949) 851-9001 appearing telephonically for Defendants David A. Sherak and Vogt, Resnick, Sherak, LLP;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling, correcting the name of the county the case is to be transferred to. DEFENDANTS DAVID A. SHERAK AND VOGT, RESNICK, SHERAK, LLP'S Motion For Change Of Venue is granted, pursuant to stipulation. The case is transferred to the County of Orange. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)
